name: chinese-trainer
description: A simplified Mandarin trainer for listening, writing, and reading practice.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:data && npm run check:app
scripts.check:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check sentence-data.js && node --check word-data.js && node --check scripts/validate-data.js && node --check scripts/validate-app.js && node --check scripts/build-site.js && node --check scripts/build-word-data.js
